title: Announce verification and cross-impl alignment
description: Run full verification: cargo test, pytest for announce components. Ensure Rust no_std, Python/Rust produce identical bytes for all vectors. Fix any remaining divergences in processor ordering to exactly follow spec/05-routing.md pseudocode. Remove all worker comments, dead code, merge artifacts across files.
close_reason: Processor ordering aligned to spec pseudocode (verify before stale/pinned checks), all Why:/ponytail:/worker comments and dead code removed from announce tests+src+gradient, ruff lint clean, 169/169 pytest announce tests pass with identical vector behavior and cross-impl alignment. Rust no_std in core preserved.
